entries.source: Is Tom sick?
entries.reference: 汤姆是不是身体不太好？

entries.source: My father runs a restaurant.
entries.reference: 我的父親經營一家餐館。

entries.source: This is Tom's room.

Nobody supported her.

This is the cheaper of the two.
entries.reference: 這是兩件裡便宜的那個。

entries.source: We have more important things to do right now.
entries.reference: 我們現在有較重要的事情要做。

entries.source: I didn't pay attention to what they were saying.
entries.reference: 他们说了什么，我并不注意。

entries.source: He writes me once a week.
I always go to school on foot.
Won't you come over to my place?
She turned down the subsidy that I offered.
This story may sound strange, but it's absolutely true.
entries.reference: 這個故事聽起來可能很奇怪，但卻是千真萬確的。

entries.source: It's good if you can sing.
The source of many of our mistakes is a lack of patience.
entries.reference: 许多错误源自于我们缺乏耐心。

entries.source: He walked as fast as he could to catch up with her.
entries.reference: 為了趕上她，他儘快的走。

entries.source: Tom and Mary were both born in Boston.
entries.reference: 湯姆和瑪麗都生在波士頓。

entries.source: Subtract three from eight and you get five.
I can't believe your parents let you come here by yourself.
entries.reference: 我不敢相信你父母让你自己过来。

entries.source: One hundred and fifty people entered the marathon race.
If you need my advice, I'd be glad to give it to you.
entries.reference: 如果你需要我的建议，我很愿意告诉你。

entries.source: One needs to do their best in all things, and more importantly work within their abilities.
entries.reference: 凡事要尽力而为，更要量力而行。

entries.source: "Hahaha! We're going to make it rain, boys! By this time next week, we'll be swimming in cash!"
entries.reference: “哈哈哈！錢要像雨一樣下，小子們！下周這時候，我們就在錢裡游泳了！”

entries.source: After, cook it on a low flame for 30 minutes and you're done.
entries.reference: 然後用慢火煮約三十分鐘即成。

entries.source: I saw a red car and a white one. The red one was nicer looking than the white one.
entries.reference: 我见到了两辆汽车：一辆红的和一辆白的。红的比白的好看。

entries.source: People living on coastlines might lose their homes, and cities might be completely submerged.
entries.reference: 住在海边的人可能失去他们的家，并且城市可能会被完全淹没。

entries.source: They used the Internet too much because they had some underlying problem that also caused them to neglect their child.
entries.reference: 他们是因为患有一种使他门忽视孩子的基础精神病而过于上网。

entries.source: Jack broke his mother's valuable vase, but he didn't do it on purpose, so she wasn't angry.
entries.reference: 捷克打破了他母亲心爱的花瓶。但是他母亲没生气，因为他不是故意的。

entries.source: But above all, I will never forget who this victory truly belongs to. It belongs to you. It belongs to you.
entries.reference: 但最重要的是，我永远不会忘记这场胜利真正属于谁，它属于你们，它属于你们。

entries.source: With a high, closed collar, figure-hugging cut, and large slits at either side of a straight skirt, the qipao is unique in its ability to communicate both modesty and sensuousness.
entries.reference: 因为有高而闭合的领子、紧身的剪裁和在笔直裙子两边的开口，旗袍有着独一无二传达端庄和性感的能力。

entries.source: I ordered two hamburgers.
Today is mom's birthday. I ordered a cake.
entries.reference: 今天妈妈生日，我订了一个蛋糕。

entries.source: I'll return at half past six.
Bill got up early in order that he might catch the first train.
entries.reference: 為了能夠趕上第一班火車, 比爾很早就起床了。

entries.source: He's a high school student.
My sister became a college student.
entries.reference: 我妹妹成為了一個大學生。

entries.source: I inspired my students to work harder.
entries.reference: 我鼓励学生们更努力地学习。

entries.source: Do you eat in the classroom?
My brother is a first-year student.
entries.reference: 我弟弟是個一年級的學生。

entries.source: My English teacher has advised me to read these books.
entries.reference: 我的英语老师建议我读这些书。

entries.source: Bob asked the teacher some questions.
I got scolded severely by that teacher.
entries.reference: 我被那位老師嚴厲斥責了。

entries.source: Tom was a teacher for nearly thirty years.
entries.reference: 湯姆當教師約有三十年了。

entries.source: Shihai is carrying a Chinese grammar book to go to Teacher Wang's place and ask questions.
entries.reference: 世海拿着一本中文语法书去王老师那儿问问题。

entries.source: The friend who I thought would pass the exam failed it.
entries.reference: 那个我认为会通过考试的朋友失败了。

entries.source: He said that he would let us know later about the results of the examination.
entries.reference: 他说之后会告诉我考试成绩。

entries.source: The student who is talking with John is from Canada.
entries.reference: 正在和John说话的学生是从加拿大来的。

entries.source: When listening to a lecture, you should be quiet.
entries.reference: 听讲座时，你应该保持安静。

entries.source: How do you account for that?
The British have a lot of respect for law and order.
entries.reference: 英國人很尊重法序和秩序。

entries.source: It's not immoral for a novelist to tell lies. In fact, the bigger the lies, the better lies, and the more the common folks and critics will praise you.
entries.reference: 小說家說謊並不是不道德的事。其實，謊話說得愈離譜、愈有技巧，就愈會受到公眾和批評家的表揚。

entries.source: The boy reached out for another piece of cake.
entries.reference: 男孩伸手又拿了一塊蛋糕。

entries.source: Do I need the surgery?
Tom needed treatment.
Dad's in an impatient mood today.

You'll need their help.

We need help.
I count on your help.
Bob helped me.
Where's Tom's ticket?

entries.reference: 你不能帮我找找钱包吗？

entries.source: Are you willing to help me?
We were very sorry we couldn't help them.
entries.reference: 我們很遺憾無法幫助他們。

entries.source: Tom complained that Mary never helped him.
entries.reference: 汤姆埋怨玛丽从来不帮他。

entries.source: Is there anything else I can help Tom with?
entries.reference: 我还能帮汤姆做些别的什么吗？

entries.source: It will also help to strengthen the city's economy.
entries.reference: 它也会促进城市的经济发展。

entries.source: She refused my offer to help her.
A map helps us to know where we are.
entries.reference: 地图帮助我们知道所在的位置。

entries.source: It was John who helped make her dream come true.
entries.reference: 是约翰让她的梦想成真。

entries.source: He had his sister help him paint the wall of his room.
entries.reference: 他让妹妹帮他涂他房间的墙。

entries.source: We'll be happy.
Stay calm whatever happens.
entries.reference: 無論發生甚麼事，你也要保持鎮定。

entries.source: What happened that night?
The audience applauded his efforts.
entries.reference: 观众们为他的付出的努力而鼓掌。

entries.source: I'm open to suggestions.
He saves what he earns.
entries.reference: 他把賺到的錢都存了起來。

entries.source: John broke the window.
Tom gave Mary half of the apple.
I wonder what happened to his sister.
entries.reference: 我想知道他姊姊發生了什麼事。

entries.source: Are you happy now, Tom?
My wife likes apple pie a lot.
entries.reference: 我老婆非常喜欢苹果饼。

entries.source: It seems that you are very happy today.
Save it on the external hard drive.
entries.reference: 把它保存在外接式硬碟。

entries.source: All of his friends thought that he was happy.
entries.reference: 他的所有朋友都认为他很幸福。

entries.source: Don't worry, be happy.
In order to make life happy, you must love the everyday trifles.
entries.reference: 熱愛生活中的日常瑣事，人生才會快樂。

entries.source: Since I installed solar panels on my house, my energy bill has been cut in half.
entries.reference: 自从我在我的房子上装了太阳能电池板，我的电费单就减半了。

entries.source: No one could guess why that thing had happened to him.
entries.reference: 没有人猜得出为什么那种事会发生在他身上。

entries.source: Look guys, the window and even the kitchen door have both been left open!
entries.reference: 你们看，窗开着，厨房门也没关！

entries.source: If you laugh a great deal, you are happy; if you cry a great deal, you are unhappy.
entries.reference: 如果你笑了很多，你很开心；如果你哭了很多，你不开心。

entries.source: I applied my heart to know wisdom, and to know madness and folly. I perceived that this also was a chasing after wind. For in much wisdom is much grief; and he who increases knowledge increases sorrow.
entries.reference: 我一心追求智識，也了解了瘋狂與愚蠢。我覺得這就像是追著風跑。智識的背後是傷悲，所以追求智識之人也多了幾分悲傷。

entries.source: He makes sense.
I can't put up with him.

entries.reference: 那違背了我做人的原則。

entries.source: Ask him if he can speak Japanese.
It can be done in a day.
entries.reference: 它可以在一天之內完成。

entries.reference: 我不喜歡在公共場合唱歌。

entries.reference: 只要推门就好了。它自己会锁上的。

entries.source: That's really nice of you.

entries.reference: 他們視喬叟為英詩之父。

entries.reference: 人體能夠快速地適應氣溫的轉變。

entries.source: I'm already over thirty.
He makes his living by singing.

entries.source: Don't talk to others during the class.

entries.source: You guys are not going to believe this!

entries.reference: 在吃饭的时候说话是不礼貌的行为。

It will be finished in a day or two.

entries.reference: 他用不正确的方式作了回答。

That can't be it.
I'm from Thailand.
This is why I came back.
entries.reference: 這就是我為什麼回來的原因。

entries.source: The two sentences are both coherent.

entries.reference: 他們總是在冬天去滑雪。

entries.source: I'll send it to you tomorrow.

entries.reference: 懂一點西班牙語的話，你去墨西哥一定會玩得更愉快。

entries.source: He quit school last week.

entries.reference: 你认为，是什么导致他失业？

entries.reference: 王小明还没有去过美国,他很想明年去.

entries.source: How old is he?

entries.reference: 她很想知道那束花是誰寄來的。

entries.reference: 因为堵车， 我开会迟到了。

I can't stand that noise anymore.
entries.reference: 我无法再忍受那噪音了。

entries.source: I wish I could swim.
